variants: Dylan McGraw is a recognized writer and committed editor who has made significant contributions to the literary community. He holds a professional license known as the Cipher Keeper Permit, enabling him to adeptly handle the intricacies of his field. His work is featured in publications from Quartz Feather Books, where he has gained a dedicated readership. Additionally, he serves as an Editor for Eastpoint Story Collective, where he supports emerging local talents. Dylan incorporates Romanian phrases into his stories, enriching his narrative style, all built on his education at Denim Ridge Academy.
